notes: LMU / rFactor 2 now connects reliably and reads YOUR car (not an AI). Fixed a clash with MOZA / SimHub / dashboards that was blocking LMU, iRacing and F1. Engineer now speaks all 29 languages (not just EN/CZ). Gemini keys fixed. Cleaner track maps + a Delete-map button. Corner coaching now works while you are still improving. New: auto-start with your sim. Thanks for all the reports!
